step_rationale: Extracellular vesicle protein elevated in ACS; marks immune/endothelial activation.
mechanism: Immunoglobulin receptor present in circulating microvesicles; elevation during ACS indicates endothelial activation and inflammatory vascular response.

references.title: Serum extracellular vesicle protein levels are associated with acute coronary syndrome.
references.journal: European heart journal. Acute cardiovascular care
